provider: User-selected agent host; recommended route is Codex Native Kernel or Codex Plugin + AutoDirector MCP
imagegen_policy: Generated hero visuals may pass only through Codex/ChatGPT plugin imagegen, explicit Image API, or user-uploaded assets. Other agent hosts can run the full non-image pipeline, but must block generated-image tasks instead of using local HTML/SVG/canvas diagrams.

producer.reason: highest-level orchestration, decomposition, Quality Gate routing, patch ownership

research.reason: user preference extraction, source quality, factual grounding, and angle selection

director.reason: timed script, caption readability, shot format, visual hierarchy, transition design, and motion constraints

asset.reason: asset acquisition, rights, imagegen prompt quality, local music inspection, and music/SFX planning

programmer.reason: translate creative plan into runtime constraints, then implement video source code

render.reason: deterministic local execution; LLM only for error triage

quality.reason: visual Quality Gate, audio/source audit, package audit, and patch task routing
